No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses on copyright law and management, intellectual property, and creative industries, with no explicit or implicit connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content is entirely unrelated to food production, access, nutrition, or agricultural practices.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course focuses on legal and management aspects of intellectual property, with no connection to health services, disease prevention, or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a tertiary education program (Target 4.3) providing advanced professional knowledge and skills in intellectual property management for employment (Target 4.4). Core competency B also links to sustainable development knowledge (Target 4.7).
evidence: Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management
習得科管與智財相關進階專業知識 (Students will acquire advanced professional knowledge in Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management)

Gender Equality.reason: The course content does not address gender disparities, discrimination, violence, or empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content is unrelated to water resources, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not address energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on copyright as an intangible asset in diverse innovative and creative industries, directly promoting entrepreneurship, creativity, and innovation (Target 8.3) and contributing to economic productivity through technological upgrading (Target 8.2).
evidence: 諸多人類創新活動情境 (many human innovation activities)
重新解析著作權作為無形資產之法律層面意涵 (re-analyzing the legal meaning of copyright as an intangible asset)
娛樂、藝術、運動、閱讀、軟體 (entertainment, art, sport, reading, software)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is offered by a 'Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management' and focuses on copyright development, innovation activities, and intellectual property as an intangible asset, directly supporting innovation and technology development (Targets 9.5, 9.b).
evidence: Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management
著作權發展相關議題 (copyright development related issues)
人類創新活動情境 (human innovation activities)

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course content focuses on copyright law and management, not on addressing income disparities, social inclusion, or discriminatory practices.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course examines copyright in 'cultural and creative industries' and 'art,' which can be indirectly linked to the protection and safeguarding of cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 文化創意或文化科技產業 (cultural and creative or cultural technology industries)

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course includes a core competency for students to 'understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues,' which provides a minimal, indirect link to promoting sustainable practices (Target 12.6) and awareness (Target 12.8).
evidence: 理解與辨別社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify social responsibility and sustainability issues)

Climate Action.reason: The course content does not address climate change, mitigation, adaptation, or related policies.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content is unrelated to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable use of marine resources.

Life on Land.reason: The course content is unrelated to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly focuses on 'Copyright Law and Management,' including reading court judgments and studying legal remedies, directly promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3) and effective institutional management (Target 16.6).
evidence: 著作權法律與管理 (Copyright：Law and Management)
經典著作權判決閱讀 (classic copyright court decisions reading)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course emphasizes developing a 'global perspective' and achieving 'national/international intellectual property rights management certification standards,' indicating an international scope and relevance to knowledge sharing and cooperation (Target 17.6).
evidence: 智慧財產權管理認證（國家/國際）標準 (intellectual property rights management certification (national/international) standards)
